name: Extended Refund Period for Loss Carrybacks

eligibility.description: Taxpayers with net operating losses or net capital losses that are eligible for carryback to prior taxable years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a special 3-year window from the due date of the return for the year the loss was generated (rather than the year the tax was paid) to claim a refund based on NOL or capital loss carrybacks.
